name: Festival water bottle
tagline: 750ml of survival. Built for the long Saturday.
description: Double-walled stainless steel, 750ml, screw-top. Keeps cold for 24 hours, hot for 12. Sand-blasted matte finish with the bonfire mark laser-etched at the base. Refill stations on-site through the night.
imageCaption: Festival bottle, matte black, laser-etched bonfire mark
